About

I'm Germán, a front-end web developer with 1 year of working experience developing websites and web apps. I'm passionate about web technologies, specially CSS, UI and Design Systems. I live in Murcia, Spain.

I'm currently improving my React skills with the interactive course The Joy of React. I also started learning Figma recently.

Technologies and tools

These are the technologies and tools I have experience with:

  • Languages

    • HTML
    • CSS
    • JavaScript

  • CSS methodologies

    • BEM
    • CUBE CSS

  • CSS preprocessors

    • Sass

  • JavaScript frameworks

    • React.js

  • Testing

    • Cypress (E2E)

  • Tools

    • VS Code
    • Git
    • GitHub
    • npm
    • Eleventy (11ty)
    • Prettier
    • Stylelint
    • ESLint
    • Jira
    • Confluence
